name: Brussel Sprout Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover Brussels sprouts with water and season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg. Place in microwave and cook on HIGH for 7 minutes.
2. Mix ground beef with salt, pepper, paprika, cayenne pepper, and chopped onions. Fry in a little oil until all is nicely crumbly. Add peeled, cubed tomatoes. Turn down heat to low and add instant broth when the tomato juice has evaporated enough.
3. Put Brussels sprouts and meat mixture into a souffle form and sprinkle cheese on top.
4. Bake in a 200°C oven for 15 minutes, until cheese begins to brown.
